description: Style Note Join style brigade with this pair of jeggings from wrangler. A season essential, this pair tapers beautifully at the hem, contours your hips and feels too good to be true! With a fashion-friendly cut that's also super comfy, we can't think of enough reasons you should buy this piece!Product Details Blue jeggings with a slight fade, has a button and zipper closure at the front, two mock pockets at the sides and two patch pockets at the backMaterial and Care Cotton-spandexMachine wash cool with like colours Do not bleach or tumble dry Use cool ironSize and FitSkinny fit, low waistThe model (height 5'8" and waist 28") is wearing a size 28
